title: Retenzy.pdf
summaries:
* Retenzy is an all-in-one customer retention and loyalty platform for growing e-commerce brands on Shopify.
* Founded in 2023 and headquartered in Pune, India.
* The platform combines customer rewards, referral structures, and product reviews to boost customer lifetime value (LTV).
* Loyalty Programs feature points-based economies, tier-based VIP tracks, and custom milestones.
* Integrated Review Management automates the collection of text, photo, and video reviews via email or SMS, syncing them with Google Shopping and generating SEO-rich snippets.
* Referral & Membership Incentives enable businesses to create custom referral networks.

* The platform integrates with Google Shopping and generates SEO-rich snippets.
* Referral & Membership Incentives allow businesses to create custom referral networks and membership tiers offering perks like early access to products, free shipping, or special discounts.
* Marketing Automation provides built-in email marketing flows, including welcome emails, shipping updates, abandoned cart reminders, and post-purchase follow-ups.
* Retenzy features over 15 pre-built visual front-end widgets to display loyalty incentives and review sections without custom development.
